headline: Mostly techie, sometimes manager
summary: Hi, I’m Maciej Lelusz - consultant, architect, and occasional tech therapist. I spend my time wrangling cloud and datacenter infrastructure, convincing organizations that IT transformation isn’t just a buzzword, and reminding people that "lift and shift" is not a strategy. As an AWS Community Hero, I balance hands-on architecture work with community mischief: running meetups, speaking at events, writing blog posts that call it like it is, and podcasting about the good, the bad, and the absurd parts of enterprise tech. I care deeply about creating better experiences with technology - though I may roll my eyes while doing it. Whether it’s storage design or culture change, I’m here to make IT a little smarter, a little more human, and way less boring. Want more insight, or a war story or two? Stay connected: https://lelusz.com
